paper_title: Climate Simulations and Pollen Data Analysis for Eastern Asia During the Last Glacial Maximum

methods.description: Simulations using the ECHAM5-MPIOM atmosphere ocean model to study climate interactions and generate sea surface temperature (SST) and vegetation parameters for the Last Glacial Maximum (LGM) and present-day conditions.

steps.description: Coupled ECHAM5-MPIOM atmosphere ocean model simulations were carried out with a very low horizontal resolution of T31.
steps.searchable_summary: run coupled ECHAM5-MPIOM model simulations at T31 resolution

steps.description: Uncoupled ECHAM5 T106 atmospheric simulations were performed using SSTs and vegetation parameters from the coupled model.
steps.searchable_summary: perform uncoupled ECHAM5 T106 simulations using SST and vegetation parameters

steps.description: SSTs were corrected for systematic errors by adding the differences between observed and simulated SSTs for the present.
steps.searchable_summary: correct SSTs by adding observed-simulated differences

methods.description: Analysis of pollen data to determine the distribution and connectivity of temperate tree populations in eastern Asia during the LGM.

steps.description: A literature review of pollen data was made based on large compilations and recent publications.
steps.searchable_summary: review literature for pollen data compilations

steps.description: Modern pollen assemblages were used to check the validity of the tree growth limits chosen.
steps.searchable_summary: validate tree growth limits using modern pollen assemblages

methods.method_name: Comparing Pollen Information with Climatic Data
methods.description: Comparison of climatic data with pollen information to identify areas suitable for temperate deciduous tree growth during the LGM.

steps.description: Climatic data were combined to find areas where temperate deciduous trees could survive and compared with palaeo-data.
steps.searchable_summary: combine climatic data to identify tree survival areas and compare with palaeo-data

steps.description: Only very few stations with observed pollen are outside the area of possible tree growth according to our criteria.
steps.searchable_summary: validate tree growth areas with observed pollen data
